segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you decided where you want to go for your summer trip? Going to to vert. Be using it so I have a free place to stay. Nice. Is it in a pretty area? Beautiful. It's in the woods, but close to a town with some. Before I go, though, I really need to get some new hiking boots. When I get home, I'll need to do some research and figure out what will be best for me.
